Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Food and Drugs Act (genetically modified food)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Food and Drugs Act (genetically modified food)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Food and Drugs Act to govern the labelling of genetically modified food.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The Food and Drugs Act is amended by adding the following after section 5:
No person shall sell any food that is genetically modified unless its label contains the information prescribed under paragraph 30(1)(b.2).
Subsection 30(1) of the Act is amended by adding the following after paragraph (b):

Paragraph.Label: (b.2)
Paragraph.Text: respecting the labelling of genetically modified food, to prevent the purchaser or the consumer of the food from being deceived or misled in respect of its composition;

Section.Text: This Act comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council.
